items.hook: Syrian civil war: The Battle of Ras al-Ayn ends with the expulsion of Islamist forces from the city by the People's Protection Units (YPG).
items.body: The Syrian civil war was an armed conflict that began with the Syrian revolution in March 2011, when popular discontent with the Ba'athist regime ruled by Bashar al-Assad triggered large-scale protests and pro-democracy rallies across Syria, as part of the wider Arab Spring. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.body:
$81bn merger halted for at least two weeks after US states sued to block deal, saying it would ‘extinguish competition’

items.hook: The Johnstown flood of 1977 kills 84 people and causes millions of dollars in damages.
items.body: The Johnstown flood of 1977 was a major flood which began on the night of July 19, 1977, when heavy rainfall caused widespread flash flooding in Cambria County, Pennsylvania, United States, including the city of Johnstown and the Conemaugh Valley. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: “He had a big impact on the history of film in this country”: Industry pays tribute to Simon Field who had died aged 80
items.body: “Simon never gave up, never compromised,” said Apichatpong Weerasethakul of his ‘Uncle Boomee’ producer.

items.hook: The COVID-19 pandemic in Suriname was caused by Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2.
items.body: The virus was confirmed to have reached Suriname on 13 March 2020. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Antibody-vaccine engineered construct abbreviated AVEC is an anti cancer drug in clinical trials that enables the immune system to detect and naturally eliminate malignant cells.
items.body: It is a biomolecularly engineered molecule consisting of the two main components: (1) antibody; (2) vaccine. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Seventh Ottoman–Venetian War: The Ottoman Empire captures Nauplia, the capital of the Republic of Venice's "Kingdom of the Morea", thereby opening the way to the swift Ottoman reconquest of the Morea.
items.body: The Seventh Ottoman–Venetian War was fought between the Republic of Venice and the Ottoman Empire between 1714 and 1718. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: A huge explosion in the mostly Kurdish border town of Suruç, Turkey, targeting the Socialist Youth Associations Federation, kills at least 31 people and injures over 100.
items.body: On 20 July 2015, the Dokumacılar, the Turkish sect of the Islamic State (ISIL), executed a suicide attack in the Suruç district of Şanlıurfa Province in Turkey. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: O. J. Simpson is granted parole to be released from prison after serving nine years of a 33-year sentence after being convicted of armed robbery in Las Vegas.
items.body: Orenthal James Simpson, nicknamed "the Juice", was an American football player, actor, and media personality. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: During the first Japanese invasion of Korea, Japanese forces led by Toyotomi Hideyoshi captured Pyongyang, although they were ultimately unable to hold it.
items.body: The Imjin War was a series of two Japanese invasions of Korea: an initial invasion in 1592 also individually called the "Imjin War", a brief truce in 1596 between the conflicts, followed by a second invasion in 1597 called the Chŏngyu War. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Mandjelia rejae is a species of mygalomorph spider in the Barychelidae family.
items.body: It is endemic to Australia. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Fujio "Fudge" Matsuda (松田 富士夫) was the first Japanese American president of the University of Hawaii.
items.body: This position also made him the first Asian American to become president of a major university in the United States. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.body:

items.hook: A quantum cryptographic protocol is device-independent if its security does not rely on trusting that the quantum devices used are truthful.
items.body: Thus the security analysis of such a protocol needs to consider scenarios of imperfect or even malicious devices. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Bruno Mars has an unexpected opening before Wembley party starts
items.body: After an eight-year absence from UK stages, Bruno Mars returned to Wembley Stadium with a polished, hit-filled show.
